Project Leadership Changes

joshuaboniface
Former Project Leader
Yesterday, 03:01 PM
Hello everyone. Effective yesterday, Anthony and I decided to depart from the project. We leave the project in the very capable hands of the remaining team who have been driving the project for many years now.

Joshua:

For me personally, it was just time for a change. I simply could no longer provide the effort that the role demanded, and thus I was facing severe burnout. Hand-off is ongoing and is amicable.

Jellyfin will continue for a long time to come, just not with me at its head.

I truly hope Jellyfin outlives me, and I trust those in the team to keep the philosophy and code alive.
Rate this post
jellykrabbypatty
Yesterday, 09:34 PM
Thank you for everything!
Cutter
Thank you very much Joshua, Anthony and Andrew for the time and effort you've put into this project.
mikey242
Thank you both so much for all the time and effort you put into this project, it is one of my favourite self-hosted projects.
